title: Bed Bug Treatment in Longwood, Bronx | $1,200 – $3,500
metaDescription: Professional bed bug treatment in Longwood, Bronx. Effective extermination for apartments & homes near Southern Boulevard. Call Best Pest Control NYC for $1,200 – $3,500.
intro: Bed bugs are a persistent problem in Longwood's densely populated residential buildings, affecting apartments, walk-ups, and multi-family homes throughout the neighborhood. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bed bug treatment services to Longwood residents, using advanced heat treatments and targeted chemical solutions to eliminate infestations completely. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of Bronx apartment living and deliver fast, discreet service to protect your home and family.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Longwood and the South Bronx for years, earning trust through effective treatments and transparent pricing. Our local technicians respond quickly to service calls throughout the neighborhood, offering same-day inspections and customized treatment plans that fit your budget and eliminate bed bugs at every life stage.
localContext: Longwood's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, NYCHA developments like Forest Houses, and row houses along Southern Boulevard creates ideal conditions for bed bug spread between units. Our team is familiar with the neighborhood's building layouts from Longwood Avenue to Intervale Avenue, ensuring thorough treatments that protect entire buildings from re-infestation.

faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Longwood?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Longwood typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your apartment, severity of infestation, and treatment method chosen. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Longwood apartment?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Longwood apartments take 4-6 hours for heat treatment or 2-3 hours for chemical applications. We typically recommend a follow-up visit within 2-3 weeks to ensure complete elimination, and most infestations are fully resolved after two treatments.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Longwood apartment during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, for heat treatments you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we raise temperatures to 120-135°F. For chemical treatments, we require residents and pets to leave for 4-6 hours. We work with your schedule to minimize disruption and provide detailed preparation instructions.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Longwood?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for families, children, and pets when applied correctly. Heat treatments are chemical-free, while our targeted insecticide applications use low-toxicity products. All treatments are performed by licensed technicians following strict safety protocols.
